languages.original_text: "It is pleasing to see that the medicae facility now has some patients who have not had access to the wonders of healing until now. But you, Lady Cassia, really don't belong in such a gloomy room."

languages.text: "Приятно видеть, что в медотсеке появились пациенты, которым до сих пор не были доступны чудеса врачевания. Но вам, леди Кассия, действительно не место в столь мрачном помещении".
"It is pleasing to see that the medicae facility now has some patients who have not had access to the wonders of healing until now. But you, Lady Cassia, really don't belong in such a gloomy room."
languages.original_text: "Приятно видеть, что в медотсеке появились пациенты, которым до сих пор не были доступны чудеса врачевания. Но вам, леди Кассия, действительно не место в столь мрачном помещении".

traits.locale_text: "It is pleasing to see that the medbay now has some patients who have not had access to the wonders of healing until now. But you, Lady Cassia, really don't belong in such a gloomy room."
"It is pleasing to see that the medbay now has some patients who have not had access to the wonders of healing until now. But you, Lady Cassia, really don't belong in such a gloomy room."
"It is pleasing to see that the medbay now has some patients who have not had access to the wonders of healing until now. But you, Lady Cassia, really don't belong in such a gloomy room."

languages.text: 「治療の素晴らしさを今まで経験したことのない患者が、メッドベイに来るようになったのは嬉しいことです。でも、あなた、カシア様は、そんな暗い部屋には本当に居ませんよね」
languages.original_text: "It is pleasing to see that the medbay now has some patients who have not had access to the wonders of healing until now. But you, Lady Cassia, really don't belong in such a gloomy room."

traits.locale_text: 「治療の素晴らしさを今まで経験したことのない患者が、メッドベイに来るようになったのは嬉しいことです。でも、あなた、カシア様は、そんな暗い部屋には本当に居ませんよね。」

languages.text: « Je suis ravi de voir que l'installation de medicae accueille maintenant des patients qui n'avaient encore jamais pu bénéficier des merveilles des soins médicaux. Mais vous, dame Cassia, n'avez pas votre place dans une salle aussi lugubre. »
languages.original_text: "It is pleasing to see that the medicae facility now has some patients who have not had access to the wonders of healing until now. But you, Lady Cassia, really don't belong in such a gloomy room."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis ravi de voir que l'installation de medicae accueille maintenant des patients qui n'avaient encore jamais pu bénéficier des merveilles des soins médicaux. Mais vous, dame Cassia, n'avez pas votre place dans une salle aussi lugubre. »

languages.text: "Es ist erfreulich, zu sehen, dass es in der Medicae-Einrichtung mittlerweile einige Patienten gibt, die bis dato keinen Zugang zu den Wundern der Heilung hatten. Ihr aber, Lady Cassia, gehört wirklich nicht in einen so schwermütigen Raum."
languages.original_text: "It is pleasing to see that the medicae facility now has some patients who have not had access to the wonders of healing until now. But you, Lady Cassia, really don't belong in such a gloomy room."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist erfreulich, zu sehen, dass es in der Medicae-Einrichtung mittlerweile einige Patienten gibt, die bis dato keinen Zugang zu den Wundern der Heilung hatten. Ihr aber, Lady Cassia, gehört wirklich nicht in einen so schwermütigen Raum."

languages.text: "Sıhhiye tesisinin artık şimdiye kadar iyileşme mucizelerine erişimi olmayan hastalara açıldığını görmek memnuniyet verici. Ancak Leydi Cassia, gerçekten böyle kasvetli bir odaya ait değil."
languages.original_text: "It is pleasing to see that the medicae facility now has some patients who have not had access to the wonders of healing until now. But you, Lady Cassia, really don't belong in such a gloomy room."

traits.locale_text: "Sıhhiye tesisinin artık şimdiye kadar iyileşme mucizelerine erişimi olmayan hastalara açıldığını görmek memnuniyet verici. Ancak Leydi Cassia, gerçekten böyle kasvetli bir odaya ait değil."

languages.text: «Me complace ver que la instalación medicae ha acogido a más pacientes que no habían tenido acceso hasta ahora a las maravillas de la sanidad. Pero usted, lady Cassia, no debería estar en un lugar tan sórdido como este».
languages.original_text: "It is pleasing to see that the medicae facility now has some patients who have not had access to the wonders of healing until now. But you, Lady Cassia, really don't belong in such a gloomy room."

traits.locale_text: «Me complace ver que la instalación medicae ha acogido a más pacientes que no habían tenido acceso hasta ahora a las maravillas de la sanidad. Pero usted, lady Cassia, no debería estar en un lugar tan sórdido como este».

languages.text: “看到医疗设施终于迎来一些此前无缘治愈奇迹的患者，着实令人欣慰。但是卡西娅女士，你实在不适合待在这般阴暗的舱室里。”
languages.original_text: "It is pleasing to see that the medicae facility now has some patients who have not had access to the wonders of healing until now. But you, Lady Cassia, really don't belong in such a gloomy room."

traits.locale_text: “看到医疗设施终于迎来一些此前无缘治愈奇迹的患者，着实令人欣慰。但是卡西娅女士，你实在不适合待在这般阴暗的舱室里。”
